recommendations.title: Mom
recommendations.overview: After her stepdaughter is sexually assaulted at a party, a furious mother sets out to destroy the lives of the four perpetrators who walked free.

recommendations.title: Offender
recommendations.overview: Justice needs to be served at Britain's most notorious young offenders institute.

recommendations.title: Landmine Goes Click
recommendations.overview: After an American tourist steps on a landmine, he is forced to watch his girlfriend get assaulted.

recommendations.title: Citizen X
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of a Russian serial killer who, over many years, claimed victim to over 50 people. His victims were mostly under the age of 17. In what was then a communists state, the police investigations were hampered by bureaucracy, incom

recommendations.title: Harry Brown
recommendations.overview: An elderly ex-serviceman and widower looks to avenge his best friend's murder by doling out his own form of justice.

recommendations.title: Minority Report
recommendations.overview: John Anderton is a top 'Precrime' cop in the late-21st century, when technology can predict crimes before they're committed. But Anderton becomes the quarry when another investigator targets him for a murder charge.

recommendations.title: Searching
recommendations.overview: After David Kim's 16-year-old daughter goes missing, a local investigation is opened and a detective is assigned to the case. But 37 hours later and without a single lead, David decides to search the one place no one has looked yet, where all secrets

recommendations.title: All the Names of God
recommendations.overview: After being implicated in a terrorist attack, Santi, a taxi driver, is taken hostage by one of the perpetrators.

recommendations.title: In the Heart of the Sea
recommendations.overview: In the winter of 1820, the New England whaling ship Essex is assaulted by something no one could believe—a whale of mammoth size and will, and an almost human sense of vengeance.

recommendations.title: Judgment at Nuremberg
